query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_variants,
  SUM(CASE WHEN vm.variantId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as variants_without_materials
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT variantId FROM variant_materials
) vm ON pv.id = vm.variantId;

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_variants,
  SUM(CASE WHEN vm.variantId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as variants_without_materials
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT variantId FROM variant_materials
) vm ON pv.id = vm.variantId;
